modules.name: Demiurge's Toolkit — Hub
modules.description: Central hub for the DTK ecosystem: module discovery, coordination, and installer.

modules.name: Demiurge's Toolkit — Alea (Dice Engine)
modules.description: Cross-system dice resolution engine: expression parsing, tier classification, and sequence execution.

modules.name: Demiurge's Toolkit — Lex (Rules DSL)
modules.description: Rules DSL engine: expression evaluator, condition evaluator, codex registry, and visual expression editor.

modules.name: Demiurge's Toolkit — Systema (Foundry Integration)
modules.description: Foundry integration layer: targeting, await coordination, condition evaluation, and actor management.

modules.name: Demiurge's Toolkit — Opus (Character Wizard)
modules.description: Character creation and advancement wizard engine: forma-driven multi-step wizard and paradigm tracking.

modules.name: DTK Fascia — UI Foundation
modules.description: UI foundation layer for the Demiurge's Toolkit ecosystem: CSS reset, design tokens, FasciaApp base class, withFascia mixin, and Handlebars partials.

modules.name: Demiurge's Toolkit — Promptuarium (Compendium Compiler)
modules.description: Compendium compiler: YAML Exemplar source to Foundry LevelDB packs with NL description generation.

modules.name: DTK Shadowrun — Example System
modules.description: Shadowrun 6th Edition example built on the Demiurge's Toolkit: dice engine integration, character sheets, and a cyberpunk theme.
